aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer — Mobile & Full-Stack
aboutPage.summary: Experienced mobile and full-stack software engineer working on large-scale projects for financial, government, and insurance organizations. Backend solutions with Spring Boot and Node.js; mobile with Flutter and React Native. Currently building industrial AI tools for mining & metallurgy as a technology advisor at Lichens Innovation.
aboutPage.industriesList: Finance · Insurance · Education · Government · Document Management · Marketing Tech · Mining & Metallurgy

publications.flutterVsRn: Develop with Flutter and compare with React Native (YouTube, FR)
publications.gaeReview: Review: Using Google App Engine to build a classic Java Spring Webapp (TrustRadius)

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.subtitle: Tools and technologies I work with

achievements.title: Open Source Projects
achievements.subtitle: A selection of open source projects on GitHub

webToolbox.title: Web Toolbox
webToolbox.description: React/TypeScript collection of developer tools — formatters, converters, QR codes, UUIDs, OCR, and more. Available as a web SPA or Electron desktop app.

guessTheText.title: Guess the Text
guessTheText.description: Flutter/Dart educational word game deployable on Linux, Android, iOS, Web, and macOS. MobX state management, local persistence, IoC pattern, E2E tests, and Node.js/NestJS REST API backend.

chromeExtensions.title: Chrome Extensions Collection
chromeExtensions.description: Collection of Chrome extensions to streamline developer workflows — tab management, clipboard helpers, productivity utilities, and Coding Guide Helper for pull request reviews and coding standards browsing.

rnPocCollection.title: React Native POC Collection
rnPocCollection.description: Proof-of-concept collection: encryption, Expo file sharing, OAuth2 federated sign-in, Three.js 3D viewer, signature pad, and Material Design theming.

openMindset.title: Open Mindset App
openMindset.description: 100% Python native app using KivyMD with AI features. Single codebase deployable on Android, iOS, macOS, Linux, and Windows.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.subtitle: Industrial AI, ML, RAG & on-device solutions at Lichens Innovation — technology advisor for mining & metallurgy. Presenting at CIM Connect 2026.
ai.intro: As an independent technology advisor at Lichens Innovation, I help mining and metallurgy stakeholders build practical, reliable AI tools — from real-time computer vision to fully local RAG pipelines.
